items.title: NASA Artemis II Mission Patch Worm Logo T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: nasa, artemis, mission, patch, worm, logo. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.title: Star Wars Classic Characters Easter Eggs Spring T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: star, wars, characters, easter, eggs, spring. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
